name: Easter Fools TF / Transformation / Mental Change
description:
Art and concept by Bendzz!
You shouldn't have put on those bunny ears... Now you're a slutty Easter bunny, and all you can think about is cock!
To make matters worse, you ordered pizza not too long ago... and there goes the doorbell!
Will you be able to resist the delivery boy? Or will your new urges prove too overwhelming...?

"Uh, hey, can you come in for a sex? I mean... a sec? Sorry, I just... I have something I need to... 'check'."
This bot uses the intrusion system by @Ezik.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
